log.notes: Upgraded TekBot with sessionStorage-based session memory (persists conversation across page navigations), context-aware query enrichment that injects current page/guide slug into KB matching, a persistent related guides sidebar panel for page-relevant guides, a clear chat button, and a session message count badge on the floating button.
Full 2FA guide already existed at two-factor-auth (safety-guides, 6 steps) and setup-two-factor-any-account (essential-skills, 6 steps). Covers SMS, authenticator apps, Gmail, Facebook, backup codes.
Full home network security guide already existed at home-network-security (safety-guides, 7 steps). Covers router password, SSID, WPA3, guest network, connected devices, firmware updates.
Software update guides already existed at software-updates (safety-guides) and understanding-software-updates (essential-skills). Covers Windows, Mac, iPhone, Android update procedures.
